description: Panel discussion on emerging applications for blockchain and crypto, featuring insights from industry leaders on digital wallets, stablecoins, and trade finance.
topic_summary: The panel discusses the impact of blockchain technology on various sectors, including the introduction of digital wallets like Clip in KakaoTalk [t=177.16], the launch of a JPY backed stablecoin by GMOz.com [t=312.42], and innovative trade finance solutions by Standage [t=350.22].
